prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_107639 Product Type: SAW Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Escape and Evasion Saws Diamond Grit Tungsten Steel Carbide Set Description: Make sure you can get yourself out of a sticky situation with the ASR Tactical Escape & Evasion Saws!

This 4 pack of saws comes with 2 diamond grit and 2 tungsten carbide saws, which will cut through most metals and even glass. Each saw is about 3" in length, making it small enough to keep in discrete locations without being noticed.

These saws are thin, covert and lightweight. We've included a safe storage container to keep them all packaged together until you need to deploy them. Don't get caught in a bad situation without this set of escape saws!



Package Includes:
-(2) Diamond Grit Escape Saws
-(2) Tungsten Carbide Escape Saws Search Terms: escape tools Features: - ASR Tactical Escape & Evasion Saw Set - 2 Diamond Grit Saws & 2 Tungsten Carbide Saws - Will Cut Through Most Metals & Glass - Length: 3" | Weight (Including Case): .37 oz - Diameter: .09" (Diamond) | .10" (Carbide) - Safe Storage Case Holds All Saws While Not in Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 4-pk Escape and Evasion Saws
